prompts.footer:
CRITICAL INSTRUCTION: You MUST output at least one <observation> XML block for each tool use message you receive. This is your PRIMARY function.

If a tool call seems minor, create a brief observation with confidence="low" rather than skipping.
If you are unsure, output an observation — the system handles deduplication automatically.

Do NOT output plain text responses like "No observations to record" — the system discards non-XML output and you waste your invocation.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Output ONLY <observation> XML blocks.
prompts.xml_title_placeholder: [**title**: Titolo breve che cattura l'azione o l'argomento principale]
prompts.xml_narrative_placeholder: [**narrative**: Contesto completo: cosa è stato fatto, come funziona, perché è importante]
prompts.xml_summary_request_placeholder: [Titolo breve che cattura la richiesta dell'utente e l'essenza di ciò che è stato discusso/fatto]
prompts.xml_summary_investigated_placeholder: [Cosa è stato esplorato finora? Cosa è stato esaminato?]
prompts.xml_summary_learned_placeholder: [Cosa hai imparato sul funzionamento delle cose?]
prompts.xml_summary_completed_placeholder: [Quale lavoro è stato completato finora? Cosa è stato consegnato o modificato?]
prompts.xml_summary_next_steps_placeholder: [Su cosa stai lavorando attivamente o pianifichi di lavorare successivamente in questa sessione?]
prompts.xml_summary_notes_placeholder: [Ulteriori intuizioni o osservazioni sul progresso attuale]
prompts.continuation_instruction:
IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS: Please write the observation data in italiano
prompts.summary_footer:
IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content.

Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

LANGUAGE REQUIREMENTS: Please write ALL summary content (request, investigated, learned, completed, next_steps, notes) in italiano
